country.name: Indonesia
country.tip: Look for hand-stamped or hand-drawn batik, not mass-printed copies.
country.chinese_tip: 留意手绘或手工盖印蜡染，避开大批量印花仿品。

products.name: Batik textile
products.note: Handmade pieces cost more than print.
products.description: Batik textile is a compact wearable keepsake that brings a traditional local craft into everyday use.
products.why_buy: A useful souvenir with more local character than a standard tourist trinket.
products.typical_overseas_price: Usually imported at a 30–70% premium, when stocked at all.
products.savings: Buy locally to avoid import mark-ups and get the widest choice.
products.airport_availability: Limited at airports; buy in town for the best choice and price.
products.online_availability: Available from selected specialist marketplaces, but provenance and prices vary.

reviews.body: Packed well and made a thoughtful gift. I would buy it again from a local shop.
Good value compared with imported options; check the label and keep the receipt.

products.name: Kopi Bali beans
products.note: Buy a roast date instead of an undated bag.
products.description: Kopi Bali beans is a packable local pantry gift with flavours that are hard to find outside Indonesia.
products.why_buy: Easy to share, lightweight to pack, and best bought where it is made.
products.typical_overseas_price: Usually imported at a 30–70% premium, when stocked at all.
products.savings: Buy locally to avoid import mark-ups and get the widest choice.
products.airport_availability: Often available in selected airport food or duty-free shops; check stock before departure.
products.online_availability: Sometimes sold by specialist grocers and marketplaces; check freshness and import rules.

reviews.body: Packed well and made a thoughtful gift. I would buy it again from a local shop.
Good value compared with imported options; check the label and keep the receipt.

products.name: Natural body oil
products.note: Keep liquids within airline limits for hand luggage.
products.description: Natural body oil is a locally inspired self-care pick that travels easily in a wash bag.
products.why_buy: A small everyday ritual that recalls the destination after the trip.
products.typical_overseas_price: Usually imported at a 30–70% premium, when stocked at all.
products.savings: Buy locally to avoid import mark-ups and get the widest choice.
products.airport_availability: Sometimes available in departure-side gift or beauty shops; stock varies by terminal.

Good value compared with imported options; check the label and keep the receipt.
